title: Don't panic if an image's ID can't be parsed
body: Return a "doesn't match" result if an image's ID can't be turned into a valid reference for any reason.

comments.body: :scream_cat: `3030dc0` is not a valid commit SHA. Please try again with `dca3d01`.
